title: Arai Corso X

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Liner

technical_analysis: The Arai Corso X utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber composite shell construction that significantly reduces overall mass without compromising structural integrity. This lightweight design is achieved through a multi-layered molding process that distributes impact forces evenly across the helmet's surface, enhancing safety during high-velocity collisions while minimizing neck strain for the rider. The internal EPS liner features variable density zones specifically engineered to absorb energy at different impact angles, providing superior protection compared to standard uniform-density liners.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of lightweight performance and premium aesthetics with the Arai Corso X. Designed for riders who demand excellence in every detail, this full-face helmet offers a sleek, modern silhouette that turns heads on the track and the street alike. Its advanced carbon fiber shell ensures you stay cool and agile, making it an ideal choice for sport touring and aggressive commuting.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Arai Corso X: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face helmet offering DOT & ECE 22.06 certification, superior ventilation, and premium fitment for serious riders.
